name: Transport Management
description: Complete transport management system — manage vehicles, define routes, create schedules, and sell tickets with real-time tracking and passenger management.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchVehicles
capabilities.description: Search for vehicles by plate, type, or status

capabilities.name: createSchedule
capabilities.description: Create a new transport schedule for a route

capabilities.name: getRoute
capabilities.description: Get route details with stops and distance

capabilities.name: updateTicket
capabilities.description: Update ticket status, seat, or passenger info

capabilities.name: deleteSchedule
capabilities.description: Cancel or delete a transport schedule

capabilities.name: getTicket
capabilities.description: Get ticket details with passenger and trip info

capabilities.name: searchTickets
capabilities.description: Search tickets by passenger, route, or date

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read transport data including vehicles, routes, and tickets

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update vehicles, routes, schedules, and tickets

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete vehicles, routes, schedules, and tickets

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full transport administration including pricing and fleet settings
